allow: PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Path "c:\\Users\\catal\\Desktop\\Rivers Lounge site" -Recurse -Exclude node_modules,.next,.git | Where-Object { $_.PSIsContainer -eq $false } | Select-Object -ExpandProperty FullName | Sort-Object)
PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "c:\\Users\\catal\\Desktop\\Rivers Lounge site\\components\\ui\\" | Where-Object { $_.Name -match "dialog|switch|select" } | Select-Object Name)
PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "c:\\Users\\catal\\Desktop\\Rivers Lounge site\\app\\admin" -Recurse -File | ForEach-Object { $_.FullName.Replace\("c:\\Users\\catal\\Desktop\\Rivers Lounge site\\", ""\) })

PowerShell(cd "c:\\Users\\catal\\Desktop\\Rivers Lounge site"; $json = Get-Content "lib\\data\\menu.json" -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json; Write-Output "Total items: $\($json.items.Count\)"; $featured = $json.items | Where-Object { $_.popular -eq $true }; Write-Output "Featured items \($\($featured.Count\)\):"; $featured | ForEach-Object { "  - $\($_.name\)" })
PowerShell(cd "c:\\Users\\catal\\Desktop\\Rivers Lounge site"; $json = Get-Content "lib\\data\\menu.json" -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json; $json.items | Group-Object category | Select-Object Name, Count)
